description: I'm more than happy. Affordable price, amazing features and no issues with product and support till now.
author: Ernesto C.
pros: How simple is to setup your bot, with nice and cool interactions, with API integrations and in just minutes you can plug the same to a landing page and start getting leads. And now even you can plug the same to your whatsapp biz account.
cons: Setting up a custom CNAME could be simpler.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Good and Value for money product!
author: Anand J.
pros: It's one of the nice and good products for small and mid-size organizations like us. In the website we can systematically track the visitors and assist them.
cons: The WhatsApp bot is difficult to set up and it's quite a bit costly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Don't waste Your time and money!
description: Don't waste Your time and money! I tryed to use this tools for 2 months, working with my team of Software developers. Full of bug: - whatsapp automation doesn't work - web solution is plenty of bugs - many features don't work - 25 minutes downtime - they have lots of SW develper problems - We sent 2 documents reports with bugs and features not working, none of that was solved - ...
author: Andrea A.
pros: Nothing.
cons: Doesn't work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Landbot is a great and easy to use chat-bot creator for beginners and also offers all the features a pro might need
author: Filip N.
pros: I strongly believe that the team at landbot.io is doing a great job, the software is easy to use, all our team members are capable of using it, and the best part is they offer all those power-ups and integrations
cons: We used it to create really complicated bots, with a lot of conditional logic and at a certain point, it takes longer for the chat-bot to save. But the user sees no difference, so I guess the software is great also for highly complicated bots
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: My experience with Landbot has been very very smooth. Setup, styling, and integrating have all been top-notch. On par with any other system i've worked with.
author: joseph B.
pros: I love the flexibility in design, integration, and conditional branching available with Landbot. We often work with fairly complex interdependent systems and Landbot has been able to fit right in like a missing puzzle piece.
cons: Cost per seat can grow unreasonably; I would like to see a business account available so that this restriction is removed. As it is we are simply unable to offer this feature with the number clients we have currently using Landbot. It feels a little stifling only being able to offer this as a lead flow system without live takeover due to ballooning costs when managing several clients with large sales teams.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Changed the course of our company! We owe it to Landbot!
author: Divyaansh A.
pros: The ease of getting started and the flexibility of maintaining the software.
cons: Transition to code is less ideal. Some more low-code features would've been helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I really like chatbot and the best thing is that you can create your bot in different ways according to your needs, but I really do not understand is why I have to pay to use fb msn sync with landbot? or what about an app for android?
author: Geoffrey G.
pros: What I like about chatbot is the interface, very easy to use, firendly, it has sense and it is intuitive. Very good for new brands and companies with needs on online customer service. I definitely recommend go to try the free version and not stay in the landbot.io homepage.
cons: The only thing i really don't like is: chatbot is only availabe on english, I can not recommend chatbot to some of my clients because they don not speaks english at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience is more than positive! The Landbot works well, in a reliable, responsive, pleasant and well structured interface. The various integrations available cover the necessary features and require minimal effort to use. I would review the price of subscriptions, which are often a reason for resistance and rejection of the platform by customers for whom I do the various projects.
author: Luciano Z.
pros: Landbot's user interface makes working within it a pleasure. Everything is smooth and stable, without any nasty surprises, with frequent auto-saving and the possibility to undo changes.
cons: The sore spot with Landbot in my opinion is the price, especially if we work in teams and the chatbot has multiple operators, for which we pay additional fees. It would be good to create a plan for single ChatBot with all the features and integrations available, at a price more in line with competitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Building and leveraging bots has never been easier!
author: Yann I.
pros: The one thing that has really impressed me about Landbot is how intuitive its Drag-and-Drop workspace is. No need to have an engineering degree nor to be a programming wizard...you can select the first element of your bot, customize it and then connect it to the second element you'll choose and edit – and so on. Landbot's focus on a visual workspace is very valuable because it allows users to see, at a glance, each step and all the different options you are building for your bot.
cons: Landbot may seem quite easy to use at first but things can get quite tricky if you want to develop an advanced or complex bot. I think that breaking up the bot into sections or parts, and having the ability to select which one to make visible in the workspace would simplify things, in the sense that would make it easier to zoom in to a particular aspect of the bot, and then zoom out to look at the bot in its entirety.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy To Use Chat Bot Builder For Marketers
description: Great chatbot tool, using it on several websites. Just be sure you have a clear plan on how you will use it before you start building your chatbot.
author: Gary S.
pros: If you are a marketer and not a developer, you may find chat bot building difficult. Landbot has a super easy to use UI that makes building chatbots easy and intuitive. They also have lots of templates to help get you started faster. I like the ability to desingn and brand each chat bot individually so I can use chat bots on different websites.
cons: Not specific to this software but chatbots in general, it needs a lot of time and planning to create a chatbot that is customer friendly enough to not annoy your visitors. You need to be able to map out the conversations and responses in advanced to make sure customers do not hit any deadends.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Landbot maakt chatbots voor ieder bedrijf mogelijk!
author: Stefan V.
pros: Landbot is écht een fantastische tool. We waren op zoek naar een tool waarmee we in een korte tijd een test konden doen met een chatbot. Zonder enige training wisten we in Landbot binnen een korte tijd een goede chatbot te bouwen die inmiddels meer dan 1.000 keer per maand wordt gebruikt en goed wordt beoordeeld. Ik ben enorm onder de indruk hoe Landbot een geweldige tool aanbiedt voor een hele lage prijs. Wil je een chatbot bouwen zonder al te veel capaciteit en geld? Gebruik dan Landbot!
cons: Het nadeel van Landbot is dat het echt gebouwd is voor kleinschalige chatbots. Als het groot wordt, zijn de flows steeds minder goed te overzien in Landbot. Daarnaast kunnen ze grote corporates, zoals Allianz, nog niet goed ondersteunen met het mogelijk maken van flows waarin je ook klantdata opslaat. Ze komen nog niet door onze securitychecks, helaas.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Usamos para fazer a qualificação de leads e o Landbot ajudou muito na migração do atendimento telefônico (pouco usado) para o conversational marketing.
author: Raphael C.
pros: Uma interface amigável "drag-and-drop" com muitos recursos de personalização. A possibilidade de integrar com Google Planilhas para centralizar os textos do chatbot é incrível.
cons: Não tenho nenhuma grande reclamação, só oferecer a possibilidade de excluir bricks não usados.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Will R.
pros: Really easy to get started with. Technical know-how not required. Intuitive builder UI. Attractive front end experience. Prompt and courteous customer service.
cons: More advanced NLP capabilities would be nice.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: software is easy to use, however, it takes longer and longer to load the more you add content to it
cons: Landbot is charging me a monthly fee without my permission. I have contacted them several times, they say they cannot end my subscription without me doing that. However, I tried many many times following their guidelines, I end up at the main page without no confirmation or info if my account was deleted or not. I'm very desperate and afraid they charge me another fee. They waited for an answer for 1 month. It is a very bad service they provide. I am very desperate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: User friendly and easy to start chat and sales bot application
description: Great and better then competitors. Hope to see AI features in the future to recognize handtyped requests and answers of users.
author: Maxim Z.
pros: Very user friendly, fun and well designed application. Intuitive user interface. Easy to implement any logic to the chat bot. Gifs improve the user experience and grow conversion.
cons: The only negative thing I found so far is that if you build a chat bot with a complicated logic and 100+ Dialog blocks even strong PC is experiencing lack of resources.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I am using it as an​ alternative to a landing page. I've had a good response​ overall and captured a good amount​ of emails.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of use and short learning​ curve it takes to get rolling and using the features makes this platform really awesome and fun to use.
cons: I had to use the initial example that was given when you first signed in to get to know how the features​ worked and ​sort of reverse engineer it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Engaging an audience to gain information from them - surveys. Compared to alternative survey experiences such as SurveyMonkey or Google Forms Landbot provides a richer experience which makes them want to do it.
author: Felix H.
pros: Used software to engage with an audience and get feedback from. The experience it provided them encouraged them to be more honest and to want to complete the chat. This allowed me to gather more information knowing I am not being a burden to the user. The connections and GUI interaction is very user friendly. Connections with apps such as Zapier.
cons: It does take more time to setup a good and enjoyable chat. Would like better support for images - such as having multiple images within a field.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great value for money for simple bots
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Good basic features for lead generation.
cons: Complexity of training could be improved and I think it will be improved oveer time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: After some time digging around and testing a variety of tools, I was very happy to have finally discovered Landbot. The tool is very user friendly, has an intuitive design, and has a great personality. I now regularly recommend people to use Landbot to validate their business ideas, without having to build full blown landing pages.
cons: There are a few form-like features, like drop down selection, missing that would make Landbot more useful for collecting user feedback.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Josh K.
pros: The interface for creating the chat flow is very intuitive and easy to understand. I was really able to sketch out relatively complex flows in little time.
cons: It would be nice if there were more options for randomisation in the chats to make it a less robotic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Need more features, not only web
description: It was great but it is not worthy when you need your bot somewhere else than websites.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease to build conversational UX and the layout as decision tree
cons: The lack of integrations (DB, Media output), harsh deploying and difficulty to take action for humans
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I found it easy to use and understand after just a few minutes of using.
cons: Can't think of anything right now. They need to make more templates....
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Lourdes S.
pros: I like that I can create quick tests with minimal coding.
cons: I wish I could control timing more (specifically on images).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Aitor M.
pros: What I liked most about landbot.io is the ease of use. It's very intuitive and the end result is great. Aesthetic and very effective.
cons: The worst thing about landbot.io is its price. Although the free version is great, the next cheaper option does not add many more utilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Nightmare to set up - little assistance
description: Stay away. There are other reviews online about the customer service being poor. Totally agree.
author: Farhan Q.
pros: On the surface it seems like the best chatbot out there. The auto translation function was what attracted us the most
cons: Once you sign up, you're pretty much left to your own devices apart from ping pong emails from the technical support team who most times don't explain things thoroughly enough. Eventually you start to understand the limitations once you've built out a workflow. Conditions must be case sensitive and done individually.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
